title: antirrhinum orontium subsp. microcarpum
intro: Antirrhinum orontium subsp. microcarpum, also known as the micro-flowered snapdragon, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Antirrhinum orontium subsp. microcarpum include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it may also be dried and used in herbal infusions.
